about.title: About Me
about.heading:
Engineering That Turns Ideas
Into Reality
about.bio1: Hello, I'm Morphine. For the past 5 years, I've been designing digital products that push boundaries and center on user experience.
about.bio2: The web world isn't just about lines of code to me; it represents an art form, a way of solving problems, and a passion for building the future.

skills.subtitle: I build modern architectures with the latest technologies.
